name: content-creator
description: Create SEO-optimized marketing content with consistent brand voice. Includes brand voice analyzer, SEO optimizer, content frameworks, and social media templates. Use when writing blog posts, creating social media content, analyzing brand voice, optimizing SEO, planning content calendars, or when user mentions content creation, brand voice, SEO optimization, social media marketing, or content strategy.
capabilities: Analyze content for SEO optimization with keyword density and structure scoring
Evaluate brand voice consistency across marketing materials
Generate content frameworks for blog posts, listicles, and case studies
Provide platform-specific social media optimization guidelines
Create content calendars with scheduling templates
Generate meta tag suggestions for improved search rankings
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 94 static findings are false positives. The analyzer misidentified markdown formatting (backticks in code examples) as shell execution, hashtag references as cryptographic hashes, and content readability terms as network reconnaissance. This is a legitimate content creation skill with Python scripts for SEO analysis and markdown reference files. No actual security risks exist.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle to produce SEO-friendly marketing materials that maintain consistent brand voice. This skill provides brand voice analysis, SEO optimization scripts, and templates for blog posts and social media content.
limitations: Requires manual execution of Python scripts for full analysis
Does not publish content to platforms automatically
Brand voice analysis works best with substantial existing content samples
SEO recommendations are guidelines, not guarantees of ranking improvement

useCases.title: New Blog Post Creation
useCases.description: Generate a complete SEO-optimized blog post using provided templates. Analyze the content for keyword density, readability, and structure before publishing.

useCases.title: Brand Voice Establishment
useCases.description: Analyze existing marketing materials to define brand voice attributes. Ensure all new content maintains consistent tone and style across channels.

useCases.targetUser: Social media managers and digital marketers
useCases.title: Social Media Content Planning
useCases.description: Create platform-specific social media content using optimization guidelines. Adapt blog content for Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Blog Post Generation
promptTemplates.prompt: Create an SEO-optimized blog post about [TOPIC]. Include a compelling introduction, 3-5 main sections with headings, and a conclusion with a call to action. Target [NUMBER] words.
promptTemplates.scenario: Writing a new blog article from scratch

promptTemplates.title: Brand Voice Analysis Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze the attached content samples for brand voice characteristics. Identify tone, formality level, and unique phrasing patterns. Provide a brand voice summary.
promptTemplates.scenario: Establishing brand voice for new clients

promptTemplates.title: Social Media Adaptation
promptTemplates.prompt: Adapt the following blog post into platform-specific social media content: [BLOG CONTENT]. Create versions for [PLATFORMS] with appropriate length, hashtags, and engagement elements.
promptTemplates.scenario: Repurposing long-form content for social channels

promptTemplates.title: SEO Content Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Review the following content for SEO optimization: [CONTENT]. Provide specific recommendations for keyword placement, meta description, heading structure, and readability improvements.
promptTemplates.scenario: Improving existing content for search engines

bestPractices: Always run the SEO optimizer script on blog posts before publishing to ensure keyword optimization and readability scores meet targets
Establish brand voice early in the content creation process and reference guidelines for each new piece
Use the content calendar template to plan distribution across platforms and maintain consistent posting schedules
antiPatterns: Do not skip keyword research before writing - always identify primary and secondary keywords first
Avoid publishing content without checking brand voice consistency - inconsistent tone damages brand recognition
Do not copy-paste identical content across platforms - each platform requires adaptation for optimal engagement

faq.question: How do I use the SEO optimizer script?
faq.answer: Run `python scripts/seo_optimizer.py [filename] [primary-keyword] [secondary-keywords]` from your terminal. The script will analyze your content and provide optimization recommendations.

faq.question: What is the ideal keyword density for SEO?
faq.answer: Aim for 1-3% keyword density for your primary keyword. Too low and search engines may not recognize relevance; too high and you risk being penalized for keyword stuffing.

faq.question: How many hashtags should I use on social media?
faq.answer: Platform guidelines vary: Instagram 10-30, LinkedIn 3-5, Twitter 1-2, and Facebook 1-3. Always prioritize relevance over quantity.

faq.question: Can this skill automatically publish content?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides analysis, templates, and recommendations. Content must be published manually or through integrated marketing platforms.

faq.question: How does brand voice analysis work?
faq.answer: The analyzer examines sample content for tone, formality, sentence structure, and unique phrasing. It then provides a profile to maintain consistency across new content.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is designed for use with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Reference the scripts and templates directly in your prompts.
